learned.question: how do i contact the college
learned.answer: "You can contact UCEW at principal-jntuhucew@jntuh.ac.in or visit https://ucew.jntuh.ac.in"

learned.question: what are the admission requirements
learned.answer: "Admissions are made through the state-level engineering entrance exam (e.g., TS EAPCET) followed by counseling and seat allotment as per the Government of Telangana rules."
